name: Gold Tone Chunky Spiral Stud Earrings
description: Make a bold statement with these gold-tone chunky spiral stud earrings. Crafted with a thick, rounded wire design swirling into a perfect spiral, complete with an anti-tarnish finish for long-lasting brilliance.

media.alt_text: Gold tone chunky rounded wire spiral stud earrings

faqs.question: Will these earrings fade easily?
faqs.answer: No, they are treated with a durable anti-tarnish coating to resist fading and maintain their gold-tone brilliance.

meta_title: Gold Tone Chunky Spiral Stud Earrings | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the bold Gold Tone Chunky Spiral Stud Earrings. Featuring a thick wire swirl design and a premium anti-tarnish finish.
